name: claude-skill-loop
description: Turn development lessons into reusable Claude Code skills — analyze patterns, detect gaps, check health
author: aliksir

scripts.test: node skill-loop.mjs examples/lessons && node skill-loop.mjs --all examples/lessons && node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');execSync('node skill-loop.mjs --json examples/lessons',{stdio:'pipe'});console.log('All tests passed');"
